hooks.command: set -e; PROJECT_DIR="${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-.}"; if [ ! -f "$PROJECT_DIR/.claude/LOOP_ENABLED" ]; then exit 0; fi; if [ -f "$PROJECT_DIR/.claude/HALT_LOOP" ]; then exit 0; fi; printf '{"decision":"block","reason":"AUTONOMOUS LOOP ACTIVE per CLAUDE.md §13. Continue: pick next item from docs/SSOT/BACKLOG.md (or TECH_DEBT.md if BACKLOG empty), branch from origin/dev, implement, PR to dev with auto-merge, then call ScheduleWakeup(60s, autonomous-loop-prompt) before ending. To halt: touch .claude/HALT_LOOP. To disable permanently: rm .claude/LOOP_ENABLED."}'
